scripts.export:pdf: mkdir -p assets && resumed export resume.json --theme jsonresume-theme-custom --output assets/resume.pdf
scripts.export: npm run validate && npm run export:html && npm run export:pdf && npm run export:tex
scripts.dev: npm run export && npm run serve
scripts.theme:build: cd theme-src && npm run build && cd .. && npm run theme:link
scripts.clean: if exist node_modules rmdir /s /q node_modules & if exist theme-src\node_modules rmdir /s /q theme-src\node_modules & if exist theme-src\dist rmdir /s /q theme-src\dist & if exist package-lock.json del /f package-lock.json
